property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21/bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21/bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\CHANDAN KONAR\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\CHANDAN KONAR\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\CHANDAN KONAR\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;.
